things.name: Grande Plage
things.description: Biarritz's famous main beach overlooked by the palatial Casino Municipal

things.name: Rocher de la Vierge
things.description: Dramatic rock connected to the mainland by a metal footbridge with a Virgin Mary statue

things.name: Cite de l'Ocean
things.description: Interactive museum exploring the world's oceans with wave simulator

things.name: Musee de la Mer
things.description: Aquarium and marine museum with seals and sharks in a 1930s Art Deco building

things.name: Phare de Biarritz
things.description: Lighthouse offering sweeping views of the Basque coastline from its 73-metre tower

things.name: Surfing the Cote Basque
things.description: World-class surf breaks from Biarritz to Hossegor on the wild Atlantic coast

things.name: Musee Asiatica
things.description: Exceptional collection of Asian art from India, Tibet, China and Nepal

things.name: Port des Pecheurs
things.description: Charming old fishing harbour with seafood restaurants and local atmosphere

things.name: Basque Country Villages
things.description: Day trips to Bayonne, Saint-Jean-de-Luz and the Basque interior

things.name: Les Halles de Biarritz
things.description: Covered market with local Basque produce, pintxos and artisan food products
